title: The Stackadoo Coin (Pilot)
style: Bright cartoony voxel-cube animation, soft rounded cube blocks, sunny and warm, smooth toy-like motion. No text on screen. Original cube characters — NOT Minecraft Steve.

segments.prompt: A sunny blocky neighborhood. MOM smiles and hands a crisp $5 bill to LEO (messy brown hair, yellow t-shirt, blue shorts) and FIONA (brown hair, purple dress); they light up and race toward a jingling ice cream truck.
A towering greasy-grinned ICE CREAM MAN slaps down two cones, takes the $5, drops just two small coins in Leo's palm and slams the window, cackling. The kids look confused.
The kids stare at the coins, unsure. Leo, embarrassed, bolts away and trips into a glowing swirling PORTAL in the sidewalk; Fiona leaps in after him.
Leo and Fiona land in a dazzling voxel wonderland of rainbow hills and floating islands. SPARK the fairy (lavender hair, sparkly wings, wand) flutters down, warm and kind.
Spark waves her wand; glowing coins float over a number path as she counts up from three-fifty to five dollars. Leo's eyes light up with understanding.
Spark presses a glowing gold coin into each child's palm; the coins flash and the kids are gently swept back through the portal.
Back at the truck, Leo confidently calls out the cheat as a crowd of kids gathers; a Sheriff hauls the sputtering Ice Cream Man away.
A cheerful new owner hands every kid a tall double cone with the change counted right. Leo and Fiona clink their glowing Stackadoo coins and grin. End on the bear-block Stackadoo logo.
